name: docker-cli
description: Docker container management as an MCP server

args.name: --all
args.description: Show all containers (default shows just running)

args.name: --format
args.description: Format output using a Go template or 'json' for JSON output

args.name: --filter
args.description: Filter output based on conditions (e.g., status=running, name=my-container)

args.name: --all
args.description: Show all images (default hides intermediate images)

args.name: --format
args.description: Format output using a Go template or 'json' for JSON output

args.name: --filter
args.description: Filter output based on conditions (e.g., dangling=true, reference=alpine)

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Fetch the logs of a container

args.name: container
args.description: Container name or ID to fetch logs from

args.name: --tail
args.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs (e.g., 100)

args.name: --since
args.description: Show logs since timestamp or relative time (e.g., 2024-01-01, 1h)

args.name: --timestamps
args.description: Show timestamps with each log line
